question_en: How is fiat approached in the opening of this book?
choices_en: As a naturally neutral public utility
As a technology with functions and failure modes
As a purely moral evil with no practical use
As a temporary wartime anomaly only
question_ko: 이 책의 서두는 법정화폐를 어떻게 다루는가?
explanation_en: The opening explicitly frames fiat as a technology to be analyzed in terms of uses and failure modes.
explanation_ko: 서두는 법정화폐를 기능과 실패 양식을 가진 기술로 분석하겠다고 밝힌다.
